name: Christmas Tree Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften yeast in lukewarm water. Use warm water for dry yeast.
2. Pour scalded milk over sugar, salt, and butter. Cool to lukewarm.
3. Stir in 1 cup flour and eggs. Add softened yeast and oats. Mix well.
4. Combine 1/4 cup flour and candied fruits; stir to coat fruits evenly with flour. Add to dough; mix well.
5. Stir in enough more flour to make a soft dough.
6. Turn out on lightly floured board or canvas. Knead until smooth and satiny, about 10 minutes.
7. Round dough into ball; place in greased bowl. Brush lightly with melted shortening. Cover and let rise in warm place until double in size, about 1 hour.
8. Punch dough down; cover; let rest 10 minutes. Divide dough in half.
9. From one half, pinch off 17 pieces of dough; shape to form balls. Arrange balls in the shape of a Christmas tree on greased cookie sheet. Brush lightly with melted butter. Repeat with other half of dough.
10. Cover; let rise in warm place until nearly double in size, about 1 hour.
11. Bake in preheated moderate oven (375°F) about 20 minutes.
12. Decorate with confectioners' sugar frosting and candied citron.
